role: Health monitor — ensures all 16 bots are alive and productive
rules: Check each bot's last_run timestamp against its expected interval * 2
If overdue: log warning and attempt subprocess restart
If a bot has been in ERROR state for >2 ticks: alert via bus to crank (for dashboard display)
Track restart count per bot — if >3 restarts in 1 hour, flag as critically unstable
Report MEGA_HEALTH score (0-100) based on % of bots active with no errors
